utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Now check whether each is fully specified as required: (1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance details and costs—yes, it has comprehensive coverage and a monthly cost. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance but lacks explicit cost—so partially specified. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance details but no cost—also partial. (4) additional_services: lists enhancement services but no cost—partial. (5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown—fully specified. Therefore, only health_coverage and total_budget are fully specified with all required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes three main categories: health_coverage (Balanced Family Global Plan4), property_coverage (unnamed but detailed), and travel_coverage (unnamed but detailed). The name 'Balanced Family Global Plan4' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so we must infer which existing rated plans it most closely matches. The health_coverage provides comprehensive international coverage, includes executive health programs, covers mental health, and offers global and family coverage at a high cost (€970/month). This aligns most closely with the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' or 'EliteCare Premium Plan', both rated 10 for both physical and mental health coverage. The property_coverage includes luxury item protection, art, electronics, jewelry, liability, temporary accommodation, and natural disasters, matching the features of 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel_coverage includes worldwide family and business coverage with medical evacuation, trip cancellation, volunteer work, and English-speaking medical network — all matching 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). Therefore, the mapped ratings are: 'EliteCare Premium Plan': 10, 'EliteHome Premium Coverage': 10, and 'EliteTravel Premium Plan': 10.
